programme.desc: After her husband travels to Bombay to try to make some money in order to pay back a loan to local money-lender Lala Sukhilal, Laxmi is left lonely and apprehensive with her three children. When they fail to hear from him for months Sukhilal offers to help as long as Laxmi becomes intimate with him, but when she refuses he decides to repossess their home and belongings as repayment for the loan.

channel.desc: TV Punjab provides authentic and credible news and high-quality entertainment content featuring Punjabi language. Television Punjab content is designed to reflex the various cultural elements of Punjab.
Saga Music is a 24/7 channel dedicated to serving Punjabi music content globally, showcasing a diverse array of genres including Folk, Pop, Sufi, Hip Hop, and Rap.

We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

A magical world awaits you, a single destination where lives glamour, fantasies and dreams. A world so colourful and real where you can literally touch, feel and become a part of the stories you see, a world of high definition. This perfect place of entertainment is called, Bollywood HD, a channel which offers treats from the world’s biggest producer of movies, Bollywood, all at your fingertips, exclusively for you. Tune in to experience larger than life blockbusters stories every single day, all year around. This one stop starry shop not just offers hot and sizzling premieres every month, but also gives you an upclose & personal peak into the gossip and news on the lives of the glamour Bollywood celebrities. Leave your worries behind and escape into the starlit world of Bollywood HD today.

Willow Sports is the free home for cricket in North America. The best of live and on-demand action from around the world is available, from ICC World Cups to the IPL. Also, other action packed live sports that will have you on the edge of your seat.

FAST moving 24/7 Sports News Network, daily breaking news about global sports, with interviews, features and highlights of the biggest sports events from over 200 sports federations. Covers sports from US and all around the world, EPL, NBA, NFL, MLB, F1, golf, tennis, cricket, etc.
A free, 24/7 English language LIVE sports, news, analysis and highlights network that brings everyone closer to the game.
SportsTVplus - All sports all the time 24-7 auto racing, BMX, basketball, beach volleyball, combat sports, football, golf, soccer, and many more. Find your game, highlights & news right here!

TNA Wrestling puts the spotlight on 20+ years of professional wrestling action, featuring addictive storylines, awe-inspiring athleticism and larger-than-life personalities. Relive all-time classics, modern masterpieces, plus original series.

FTF Sports is an emerging worldwide network offering engaging video content established to serve the passionate fan's appreciation for competition, sportsmanship, and performance. FTF Sports features a 24/7 broadcast, including live games & events, interviews, predictions, analysis, and a variety of dynamic, original programming.

Chardikla Time TV North America brings you 24/7 Punjabi news, entertainment, and cultural programming, serving the vibrant Punjabi and South Asian communities across North America. Experience exclusive coverage of major community events, including Bangla Sahib, Patna Sahib, Yuba City Nagar Kirtan, Los Angeles Nagar Kirtan, Holla Mohalla Riverside, Boston Bhangra, Sikh Day Parade New York, South Asian Showdown, Kabaddi, Soccer, and Field Hockey. Chardikla Time TV North America is your go-to destination for authentic Punjabi content. Watch live now and stay connected to your roots!

Chardikla Time TV is a top-ranking Free-to-Air Infotainment channel from Punjab, known for its live Gurbani telecast from sacred sites. It features news analysis, talk shows, crime series, documentaries, and social discussions. Catering to all age groups, it offers diverse content and strong engagement, making it a trusted choice for advertisers and viewers worldwide.

Chardikla Gurbaani TV, with the motto “A Bliss to Humanity,” is a 24×7 Free Sikh Devotional Channel available globally on various platforms. It features live telecasts from Takhat Sri Harimandir Ji Patna Sahib, Gurdwara Sri Bangla Sahib, and special broadcasts from North America. Dedicated to Sikh teachings, history, Katha, Kirtan, and Dhadhi shows, it spreads the message of Gurbani worldwide.

programme.title: Dil Hai Betaab
programme.desc: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry.

programme.title: Dahleez
programme.desc: Naini and Shekhar love each other, but due to a misunderstanding, she decides to leave him and marry another man. However, her whole world comes crashing down when Shekhar reappears in her life.

programme.title: Dhund
programme.desc: After crashing his car on a foggy night, a man seeks help at a nearby home, where he encounters a dead man and a woman holding a gun. After hearing her sad story, he helps her hide the crime.

programme.title: Hum
programme.desc: A wealthy and cruel businessman, Bhaktawar lord over a dockyard making all the workers his slaves. All the workers will work but no one will entail a salary, the union leader Tiger opposes this and protests and is eventually silenced by Bhaktawar.

programme.title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
programme.desc: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Bade Dil Wala 1983
programme.desc: After losing his daughter Juhi in a train accident, Sinha meets her husband Vijay and makes him his heir. Later, a doctor shows up with an amnesiac Juhi and a dark secret about Vijay.

programme.title: Pakhandi
programme.desc: Circumstances separate two brothers in their childhood. However, they reunite in their adulthood after a series of events.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
programme.desc: Sunil, a promiscuous navy officer, falls in love with Anuradha and introduces her to his family. However, an admirer of Anuradha tries to deceive Sunil by informing him that she is a single mother.

programme.title: Loha 1987
programme.desc: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

programme.title: Batwara
programme.desc: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between Vikram, who comes from an aristocratic family, and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

programme.title: Aasmaan
programme.desc: Captain Kumar's wealthy reserves fill Chandan, his lookalike, with jealousy. In order to fulfil his greed, he decides to takes Kumar's place by pretending to be him.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Daur 1985
programme.desc: A landlord offers an unemployed young man a position that requires him to evict people living in his building who do not pay rent on time.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: Raju, is comming to Bomaby and start working as a engineer in a company where is boss and the boss's daughtert, Sapna Chhabria who starts to make plans about Raju's bright future, which comes at a heavy price, as he does makes compromises.

programme.title: Zameer 1975
programme.desc: A king's son is kidnapped by a dacoit. Years later, a boy claiming to be the son arrives at the palace, but he falls in love with the king's daughter.

programme.title: Kaash
programme.desc: A film actor takes to alcohol after suffering huge losses, which in turn, takes a toll on his marriage and his wife leaves him. But when their child falls terminally ill, they reconcile for his sake.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Two close friends, Yash and Raja, share a passion for cars and beautiful women. They both falls in love with the same women.

programme.title: Naya Daur
programme.desc: A man introduces a bus service in an attempt to make quick profits and endangers the peace and livelihood of local farmers and workers.

programme.title: Loha 1987
programme.desc: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Long-suffering heiress Seeta is treated worse than a servant by her abusive money-grubbing aunt. Meanwhile, her long-lost twin sister Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer. One day, the girls unintentionally swap places.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Long-suffering heiress Seeta is treated worse than a servant by her abusive money-grubbing aunt. Meanwhile, her long-lost twin sister Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer. One day, the girls unintentionally swap places.

programme.title: Shaan
programme.desc: While carrying out his investigations against gangster, Shakal and his gang, DCP Shiv Kumar is mysteriously killed, leaving two reformed brothers to average his death.

programme.title: Apna Bana Lo
programme.desc: After losing his parents at a young age, Master is raised by a gangster who teaches him the tricks of his criminal trade. However, when Master adopts a child, he decides to give up on crime.

programme.title: Saagar
programme.desc: Raja, a fisherman is secretly in love with Mona. When wealthy Ravi comes to live with his grandmother, Kamladevi, he sees Mona and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Dastaan
programme.desc: Vishnu, a reputed judge, is assumed to be Anil, an absconding murderer. However, he decides to travel to Anil's home town and unravel the mystery behind his lookalike's existence.

programme.title: Saveray Wali Gaadi
programme.desc: Ravidas lives in a village in rural India. He is the son of Chediram who is of highly respected in the village. Ravidas falls in love with Jyoti. Their love becomes known in the village.

programme.desc: After losing his daughter Juhi in a train accident, Sinha meets her husband Vijay and makes him his heir. Later, a doctor shows up with an amnesiac Juhi and a dark secret about Vijay.

programme.title: Pakhandi
programme.desc: Circumstances separate two brothers in their childhood. However, they reunite in their adulthood after a series of events.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
programme.desc: Sunil, a promiscuous navy officer, falls in love with Anuradha and introduces her to his family. However, an admirer of Anuradha tries to deceive Sunil by informing him that she is a single mother.

programme.title: Loha 1987
programme.desc: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

programme.title: Batwara
programme.desc: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between Vikram, who comes from an aristocratic family, and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

programme.title: Aasmaan
programme.desc: Captain Kumar's wealthy reserves fill Chandan, his lookalike, with jealousy. In order to fulfil his greed, he decides to takes Kumar's place by pretending to be him.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Daur 1985
programme.desc: A landlord offers an unemployed young man a position that requires him to evict people living in his building who do not pay rent on time.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: Raju, is comming to Bomaby and start working as a engineer in a company where is boss and the boss's daughtert, Sapna Chhabria who starts to make plans about Raju's bright future, which comes at a heavy price, as he does makes compromises.

programme.title: Zameer 1975
programme.desc: A king's son is kidnapped by a dacoit. Years later, a boy claiming to be the son arrives at the palace, but he falls in love with the king's daughter.

programme.title: Kaash
programme.desc: A film actor takes to alcohol after suffering huge losses, which in turn, takes a toll on his marriage and his wife leaves him. But when their child falls terminally ill, they reconcile for his sake.

programme.title: Hameshaa
programme.desc: Two close friends, Yash and Raja, share a passion for cars and beautiful women. They both falls in love with the same women.

programme.title: Naya Daur
programme.desc: A man introduces a bus service in an attempt to make quick profits and endangers the peace and livelihood of local farmers and workers.

programme.title: Loha 1987
programme.desc: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Long-suffering heiress Seeta is treated worse than a servant by her abusive money-grubbing aunt. Meanwhile, her long-lost twin sister Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer. One day, the girls unintentionally swap places.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Long-suffering heiress Seeta is treated worse than a servant by her abusive money-grubbing aunt. Meanwhile, her long-lost twin sister Geeta grows up to be a gutsy street-performer. One day, the girls unintentionally swap places.

programme.title: Shaan
programme.desc: While carrying out his investigations against gangster, Shakal and his gang, DCP Shiv Kumar is mysteriously killed, leaving two reformed brothers to average his death.

programme.title: Apna Bana Lo
programme.desc: After losing his parents at a young age, Master is raised by a gangster who teaches him the tricks of his criminal trade. However, when Master adopts a child, he decides to give up on crime.

programme.title: Saagar
programme.desc: Raja, a fisherman is secretly in love with Mona. When wealthy Ravi comes to live with his grandmother, Kamladevi, he sees Mona and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Dastaan
programme.desc: Vishnu, a reputed judge, is assumed to be Anil, an absconding murderer. However, he decides to travel to Anil's home town and unravel the mystery behind his lookalike's existence.

programme.title: Saveray Wali Gaadi
programme.desc: Ravidas lives in a village in rural India. He is the son of Chediram who is of highly respected in the village. Ravidas falls in love with Jyoti. Their love becomes known in the village.

programme.title: Kyo Kii... Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
programme.desc: Raj is a lawyer who finds great success through his habit of lying. However, when his son wishes for his father to stop lying, Raj is magically forced to speak the truth and gets into trouble.

programme.title: Kitne Door... Kitne Paas
programme.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: The Indian version of The Godfather, with the focus on SARKAR, an Indian politician.

programme.title: Mere Jeevan Saathi
programme.desc: An Indian pop star is coming to USA in order to sign a contract with one of the leading music studios. He finds himself heaving one night affair with the CEO of the company. Things go wrong when he find her in his flight back home.

programme.title: Raeeszada
programme.desc: When Sanjay, a policeman, arrests Jagannath, a gangster, his senior disagrees and frees the goon. Sanjay decides to resign and fight corruption on his own.

programme.title: Agnee Prem
programme.desc: When two childhood friends are separated from each other, they promise to meet each year at a temple on a hill. However, they meet 10 years later when they are grown-ups.

programme.title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
programme.desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

programme.title: Ek Thi Daayan
programme.desc: Bobo, a famous magician, plans to marry his girlfriend Tamara. Tragedy strikes when he gets scary hallucinations about his dead sister. Left with no other option, he seeks a psychiatrist's help.

programme.title: Ragini MMS 2
programme.desc: A sleazy film director's decision to shoot his latest erotic horror movie in a notorious haunted house angers the vengeful spirit of its past inhabitant.

programme.title: C Kkompany
programme.desc: Three friend residents in the 'C' block of a Mumbai Apartment complex with monetary issues decide to create a fake organization 'C Company' in order to extort 1 Crore Rupees but thimgs goes wrong.

programme.title: Mission Istaanbul
programme.desc: A news reporter must uncover the secret on the 13th floor of a News Station.

programme.title: Kuku Mathur Ki Jhand Ho Gayi
programme.desc: Longtime friends suffer a rift in their relationship when their dreams and family obligations arrive at odds with each other.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: A notorious boy decides to attend college in Bangalore, but instead falls in love with a girl who has to marry a terrorizing police officer.

programme.title: Kyaa Kool Hain Hum 3
programme.desc: Kanhaiya and his friend Rocky make a living by acting in adult movies. Things take a turn when Kanhaiya falls in love with Shalu, and finds it hard to convince her conservative father.Cast: Tushaar Kapoor, Aftab Shivdasani, Director:Umesh Ghadge 2016

programme.title: Dear Maya
programme.desc: Two girls decide to prank a local woman by writing letters for her as her secret admirer. However, things take a turn when she goes missing.

programme.title: Kohram
programme.desc: Major Balbir (Amitabh Bachchan) attempts to kill the Indian Home Minister Veer Bhadra Singh (Danny Denzongpa) but is unsuccessful. He has been identified, and the army is on the look-out for him to court-martial him.

programme.title: Bandit Queen
programme.desc: Phoolan Devi, who belongs to a lower caste, faces sexual abuse and discrimination in society. A turn of events leads to her becoming the revered leader of a gang.

programme.title: Baabul
programme.desc: Will Malvika the widower be able to remove her husband Avinash from her heart and mind and marry someone else?

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Mumbai
programme.desc: A tale of two gangsters from the eras of past and present, whose lives enter parallel paths as they struggle to survive within Bombay's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Lsd Love Sex Aur Dhokha
programme.desc: A video camcorder, a store security camera, and concealed cameras candidly expose lives in three loosely-linked tales.

programme.title: Lsd Love Sex Aur Dhokha
programme.desc: A video camcorder, a store security camera, and concealed cameras candidly expose lives in three loosely-linked tales.

programme.title: Hum
programme.desc: A wealthy and cruel businessman, Bhaktawar lord over a dockyard making all the workers his slaves. All the workers will work but no one will entail a salary, the union leader Tiger opposes this and protests and is eventually silenced by Bhaktawar.

programme.title: Guddu
programme.desc: Guddu and Salina meet with an accident and she loses her eyesight. Later, when Guddu learns that he is terminally ill, he decides to donate his eyes to her, but his father disapproves.

programme.desc: Lal Singh lives alongside his mother in a small basti in Mumbai, where Vikram Singh is the don of the city and there is always clash between him and Lal Baadshah.
